textByHashes.96673b1c7a642876e3c7b153e942eef53e837df9: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.
textByHashes.6cd8a3f1a3f1ca2cbc973221df60f98ea5becb68: Yes, we found a rather interesting island to the North of Morytania. We believe that it may be of archaeological significance.
textByHashes.8e049a735c683830fc43ac79e911c1fb9a42c7f7: Indeed. We are making the final preparations for our voyage, in fact, you may be just the person we are looking for... Assuming you've got the necessary qualifications, that is.
textByHashes.8e42d7cbf3c0011436158aeab09c3809dfc01290: Although you do have the necessary qualifications, I'm not sure you're ready. Come back another time, and we'll discuss further.
textByHashes.749081ba24f54338ef31a74a37756863d196a00e: Yes indeed. You've helped us a great deal around the Museum and you have the necessary qualifications from the Earth Sciences exams.
textByHashes.4aad939c56b110c3cf0bfd20189b2bc54ca58fdf: I have received word from the digsite that the canal has been constructed, and the barge is awaiting some final touches.
textByHashes.b0f433f12b034b029a54ffafc5940e7fde25c9d6: The site foreman requested the aid of a qualified and experienced adventurer, and I believe you would be a perfect fit for the role.
textByHashes.f2ecab2ec6fddb8ba8138f3af6cadacd00a70a50: That's great to hear. You should speak to the foreman at the digsite canal, I'll make sure he knows to expect you.
textByHashes.4a395f2f66ff0cd789aaf044418ec3597140ffc1: Fair enough, do let me know if you happen to change your mind.
textByHashes.2b3fa65363a1c7eac8c3d691cf5030c59a799dd0: I'm afraid there's not much more I can help you with, Dazaator. The foreman at the digsite should be able to answer any of your questions, good luck.
textByHashes.a3870e6288d5c19a46c822d3e319f86c3453010a: The expedition to the island North of Morytania is certainly the most interesting thing going on around here at the moment.
textByHashes.11357c51d2ef0c4974516a9e3d85fd459b66d064: I'm flattered, but I'm sure I don't have the combat prowess for those kinds of shenanigans.
textByHashes.4abf3c50c30a47076e1173d68f7be47735bff201: I'm not sure the shield, nice as it is, will make that much difference.
textByHashes.ea9c92f99f166e87807421d49861bdbb63837fbd: Well, I've held it a few times in the course of my work, but I'll give it a go.
textByHashes.3ad1e98afee819681ba68ab79be818cb033f3305: Nothing special seems to be happening.
textByHashes.1eca5a2789e793348583706337d7e3d4c526ab39: Well I wish you luck in finding them.
textByHashes.a13ec2e0c2e3e8a2a9232ed83e84279963daef09: Nothing special seems to be happening. Why do you think I'm descended from an original elder of Varrock, anyway?
textByHashes.60c90760a9ff3377706a3e332efb1436e4c355a4: Now that is smart thinking, but I'm not actually a blood descendant of the original Halens. My great-grandfather was adopted into the family.
textByHashes.aaddf30b8ae62869a1e5bd32390c61558d47f7d3: The last descendant of the Halen line that I know of was a lady named Edwina. She married into the Fitzharmon family.
textByHashes.ac5ed3d15be242ba8a6cbbbb88e78f700aa8a57c: Er... How did you come to hear about that? It's not something you hear of much around these parts!
textByHashes.a5a6e4a4a585c62fece863c79fa04da689fb8bd5: What awful news! I'm not sure I can help you with that, though...
textByHashes.cf3c7456e260ae1d4cc661fcd721db2754ab6f57: Yes, awful news! I do hope you manage to find it!
textByHashes.b5d209c9e045659a351abe03b2f9e9f03a8459f5: So you found the diadem? That's... Er... That's wonderful news!
textByHashes.bb52566454532c7d5c28a85656bee5f605e625f7: I'm sure that the Grand Museum will be thrilled to hear it.
textByHashes.388c901ae6efe0e21b820c6ecdc8618d0fa18904: I don't know what you're talking about!
textByHashes.6ba6a9357de63eaf8226d1cb98008d2a78b14e50: Steal?! I would never! You need to get your facts straight!
textByHashes.e269a30126358922a2873df7b8c31ece72c12f72: They'd understand my actions... I'm just trying to preserve history.
textByHashes.5af5ccc5de321fa016c8d049e00ae86150e3afe7: Well, as soon as they're ready to display it again, they can have it back!
textByHashes.0e86db3db054c79c76af32d34960a97f39b8bfb3: No! You have no idea what you're asking me!
textByHashes.f8a5e2c1803a68c6d56a2fbcbeaa454bcccb4334: They will find out! As soon as you stop bothering me, I plan to tell them myself.
textByHashes.83ca902230c5e5ae84c06a438415c07d34f8e733: Much better knowing that this valuable artefact is safe and sound!
textByHashes.fc3b4bdf0881959ded4bade68fd070907d944818: Archaeology is cool! This was just an exceptional circumstance...
textByHashes.d1d8a7a42a8e8f06adf93f1f92c06abedaeab29e: There's nothing for me to be ashamed of! I merely did the best I could in a tough situation.
textByHashes.29556ac20b1819a70af8dedf7bb919f3de09bdd8: Believe me, 'real' historians have done far worse.
textByHashes.504b6c8facf9848397cee7e2f7b243f9f26a504b: What? Is this really how people see us?
textByHashes.c7ac107ab6d75c138936870d687db522689ab3cf: I... haven't had time to inform them yet. But I will! I just have to get my story straight...
textByHashes.a900fbaa9bde439c1f5b222c4504e0d86d3a2722: No, but this really is archaeology! I promise!
textByHashes.be38845686ddc2292c59732b9e86a2f4913ad93f: Sometimes protecting history means taking... unconventional measures.
textByHashes.eb67c52286aab6f19d44c0e4d7bcd56ae3f8ae80: That's why I put it in storage! No, wait, that's not what I meant!
textByHashes.e6be272b9c855a86d3c3e63062cebfb690ea66b0: Maybe, but I know what I saw, and I wasn't impressed!
textByHashes.818483fa767cc0beed757b6f4a6aa92271dd71f9: No, but our duties go well beyond putting artefacts on display for adventurers to gawk at!
textByHashes.6a55575f2b1f7e248747f018e7045d76227dce2b: If everyone cared only for their own town's history, we'd have a pretty boring world.
textByHashes.bf8aefc3b2863f01471b521446dcea09a756780b: I had no other choice. I couldn't just stand by!
textByHashes.61d0a45b62291c44eef0394ab8fefe50ab9e3285: But I'm no thief! Give me a chance to explain...
textByHashes.a143c61813e63d5f41c7133ba19d1011aecead35: Then you'd be a thief! This is nothing like that!
textByHashes.2a7e25c0d0a238b191dbef07375f30d9df984034: I have not! Just give me a chance to explain!
textByHashes.d7d63757c2e7c78ae19bc3062a5ef3fc857c9016: Well, they can always come visit. Or perhaps we can arrange a loan?
textByHashes.30876f3511e23c9a8c30a2a7d385505a7c69d684: I've done Varlamore a great service! They just don't know it yet...
textByHashes.f94a5d3f4346ff6d5ce166be24f4daef927b5717: I'll return them as soon as I know they'll be safe. Until then, they'll stay right here!
textByHashes.a008369326af740ba71325f6ec67c64a4bf43dbc: How dare you! I've never once failed to follow the proper procedures. Well, except this one time. But this is different!
textByHashes.fe659ab47fe7a4f7cc993dfc9d8e824a8d2d881a: Better that than the loss of a priceless artefact! It's not my fault they didn't look after it.
textByHashes.4987189db809649f62313e73730228a66ac13d76: I didn't steal them! The museum simply borrowed them for further study.
textByHashes.55175797972bb01ad850372a93ace4988430e173: Had I not done something, it could well have been damaged anyway!
textByHashes.bc0645b1879e826ebe5ad5393e2e5ea290b7bbfb: Because I'm the only one willing to protect them!
textByHashes.a631e35f59290ab58b64c024e4bb852e2635ee2e: Oh dear... Children! Pay no attention to this loud, dramatic argument!
textByHashes.d75d0ec8dc736fbfd587d03261c79f2b0408ac7b: Nothing here is stolen from other museums! Er... I mean, nothing is stolen at all!
textByHashes.6ded548710f23fea9dd58272856e16b70a92e73a: Well that's the reality. Sometimes you have to make tough choices.
textByHashes.8b789940f66fe8f2b3f9a056f9a3f3f70226ac9b: The fact that I had to save this artefact at all says enough. It needs to be kept safe!
textByHashes.6ccd5b68d942ab46df381831062cfb575c0482e8: Are you quite serious? Just because an artefact is from another culture doesn't mean it's cursed. Adventurers these days...
textByHashes.5ba5978443ab2e06981397c56681e5131d2a257c: Normally I'd agree, but this one situation is a little more nuanced than that...
textByHashes.bceddd5b1ec6ace5a9596fada87a821eac522d94: Absolutely! We're the greatest, most well-equipped museum in the world!
textByHashes.5d6e3d8220f95cd9fbbaa3ddabf6b921eb7246db: I... I did the right... Stop staring at me like that!
textByHashes.612a6f55e3efdf2ff516782ee7e8cb201f408e42: We don't have enough room to show everything in our collections. If only we had the funding...
textByHashes.f1b99d26f533f90023aa166256d2770d1be473a0: A loose cannon? A wild card maybe. Or a lone ranger. But a loose cannon?! Surely not...
textByHashes.6b4e5777d62e8e1edac976772e8cd2e56badb153: There's no need to take that tone with me!
textByHashes.3ddb9eddd443fbf38553a0076ae2ce7664013853: That's not true! I mean, I am better than this. I mean... oh, I'm all mixed up.
textByHashes.33afdc81def8e513beb695351518bd5912abffbb: Please stop telling everyone I'm a thief...
textByHashes.7a592dfc819380b9f5487d97b9b0f84c465c1b96: Not every museum has the resources to keep their artefacts safe. We're just taking care of them for now.
textByHashes.af149ddfd83fff57b35f1f9fe772ffe4c6c020e5: I believe artefacts like this belong to all of us. That's why it's so important for me to preserve them.
textByHashes.b6922c9da2d955e229e229975d52cf0ef3346f84: They had the choice to take better care with this artefact! That's not on me.
textByHashes.2dc49dfb9c66eb817963a25db770a66776f5b112: I'm not embarrassed! I just put it in storage for... for normal reasons!
textByHashes.e1d3120e6dfe6e5506f07fd6dbc6d498f0bec8ae: How dare you? I'm a well-renowned professional, not a thief!
textByHashes.8517a52018c182f78df3e01300d142d06175acaa: Well, sometimes the law is wrong!
textByHashes.be0e7276a2f4db8e2b18fb8039ba261afd9773fc: For what? I'm only doing my job!
textByHashes.4a5cf02957fb6ff06859562efacd68624137dcbb: Oh, nonsense! Any real historian would see I'm only trying to preserve vital historical knowledge.
textByHashes.27b715c32f4cf1cb889d93715039427079c9aa3c: It's not my fault they couldn't look after their own history. Better that I took it than some thief!
textByHashes.6ec66ea0d239e28dee825e6a5374c4238f313f69: Of course I'm a real historian! This just isn't my finest moment...
textByHashes.e1c8cf2e43a705b6e4f3b78c3c2ce447bc6b3621: Artefacts aren't just for gawking at! We keep things in storage so they can be studied and taken care of.
textByHashes.3b1e306d3325b0705dd67cae0e99a26157809d9a: Pish-posh! I haven't dedicated my life to this museum for you to slander my good name!
textByHashes.fdb40e5e1c891769812d8203294a7fc15d8d0c71: Now that's not true! They can see it any time they visit Varrock, for free!
textByHashes.4b7a1aa4bc9469cac843e41c041a0214ba6f0f09: Oh, pish posh! I've had enough of this little shame game of yours! I've got better things to be doing with my time. Come back to me when you've got your facts straight!
textByHashes.af36f88e7464eb0de5fb9183b2652d0cdc987103: I didn't steal anything! These are ethically acquired antiquities!
textByHashes.2fb8d06dae406eeabe942042e21ff6ec5e32eb55: Naturally, as soon as Varlamore opened, I was keen to visit their Grand Museum.
textByHashes.a5418f257f6586e28b61e9ec2b3499d3972ed69f: There was a big event over at the Colosseum, so it was nice and quiet. Perfect for taking in everything the museum had to offer.
textByHashes.45217b82c223904aa44dde6935f953f241ae4762: All of a sudden, I heard a strange noise coming from behind me...
textByHashes.22aee1334347e9f81cbe1c40c4ef019e2ce0971c: It was a thief! He'd stolen Xerna's Diadem!
textByHashes.1d00f652af89d6572743ac682bd7ea4405fb21d5: I had to act quick. I called upon my skills from my time in the Varrock Guard and I showed him what for!
textByHashes.0184e5bf28189c1d805eae9f7003231e63f028d2: He went down easily, but I was left with a conundrum: What to do with the diadem.
textByHashes.1c4bf4809650b50249919218d1bc75a37c97a288: This was a priceless artefact, and it was at risk! I knew it had to be protected, and there was nowhere better than in Varrock...
textByHashes.62ecc7076b61a5f185925c74a1b710fd96a865c6: Now I don't know what to do...
textByHashes.ddd4bf9b5e95e9d4621a739f06b097d374b16a73: I promise, I only wanted to keep it safe. I guess I panicked...
textByHashes.f21564276a6a3dd130a30740c5832c024362fec2: Okay... I'll have it sent back at once.
textByHashes.c35996e77b4f450f91c514d1638c31731741c2e0: I'm just making arrangements to have it sent back to Fortis. It will be there very soon.
textByHashes.f22f890fa231ca19081f1d62b323ee6b22e8c0ae: The Shield of Arrav! Goodness, the Museum has been searching for that for years! The late King Roald II offered a reward for it years ago!
textByHashes.40824ab17931d5a216348b0a9834b79c7913922b: Let me have a look at it first.
textByHashes.5b9eac8af79732105338e5f82648473716f286f1: That shield has been missing for over twenty-five years!
textByHashes.2bbe60ba48e224487aaf9affa690753cc1e87a5c: Leave the shield here with me and I'll write you out a certificate saying that you have returned the shield, so that you can claim your reward from the King.
textByHashes.fea91c8fbbe381dc4ef8097824f80154d2b6e23f: Yes, certainly. Please hand over the shield.
textByHashes.9225879c97e0bd34b5655d812cd5cd88840a3296: Of course you won't actually be able to claim the reward with only half the reward certificates...
textByHashes.b423a51880c7848f3414a573831e5b816b493d72: Well, if you were to get me the other half of the shield, I could give you the other half of the reward certificate. It's rumoured to be in the possession of the infamous Blackarm Gang, beyond that I can't help you.
textByHashes.9b39a30b3fbc8858dd6555e899bf85c986201788: The Shield of Arrav? The Museum has been searching for that for years! The late King Roald II offered a generous reward for its return!
textByHashes.1c060bdf3a30849855ab52105b415956aec97819: You've found the shield? Let's have a look!
textByHashes.a9d1de05dc6213a92388639c2e36686e56854233: This is incredible! But where's the other half?
textByHashes.3ffb7d50e842ab99553842c6b0c5d3f79a46b725: That does sound plausible. We will have to hope that another adventurer can recover that half.
textByHashes.09ee55cc1e31e5507ec83ccdf12d58621eb0ab4a: I'm afraid the reward is for the recovery of the full shield. However, what I'll do is write you out two half- certificates. If another adventurer returns the other shield half, I'll do the same for them.
textByHashes.eacf45dc8a8f979b406c71e900a2756ea9bf8471: The two of you can then swap one of the half- certificates to make a full one each. Take that to the King and he will grant you your reward.
textByHashes.c3f52870006a1fd2419002e3b431abb36d6e5447: I gave you two half-certificates for the half you returned. If another adventurer returns the other shield half, I'll do the same for them.
textByHashes.0c38aca0a3ac8e8b776b13f62611d913c78a86c5: The two of you can then swap one of the half-certificates to make a full one each. Take that to the King and he will grant you your reward.
textByHashes.97213281e412b871dee05b27a4f311e18e997a97: I suppose so. It's not like you can do anything with them without the other half.
textByHashes.ad3a04405635564d2e9d01a10486d0a25c6bd530: What have we here? A letter of recommendation indeed!
textByHashes.3351fd9b3068da716fcb5279e69b24c380ba7f48: Normally, I wouldn't do this... but in this instance I don't see why not.
textByHashes.3d79377a067594e6b60f87b34977997e3bbc3239: The letter here says your name is . Well, , I wouldn't normally do this for just anyone, but as you did us such a great service with the Shield of Arrav I don't see why not. Run this letter back to
textByHashes.79faadb94deb1e707ab8c96780d54acad25d61d7: the Examiner to begin your adventure into the world of Earth Sciences. Enjoy your studies, Student!
textByHashes.c165b834d1ff20713f7a4b7539e4297e0ee1de89: There you go; good luck student. Be sure to come back and show me your certificates. I would like to see how you get on.
textByHashes.cf666d195daef5e366af9651b3e43e15acb0e8a4: Yes, I saw you drop it as you walked off last time. Here it is.
textByHashes.ce538ba21d41dc7e4575ff954484148d0e0dad4a: I see you still have that letter I stamped for you. Why don't you run it back to the Examiner at the Exam Centre?
textByHashes.9fa369476d3da9194b4f92883a50a776c51e7ef9: You've already given me one of those! But... ok, give it here...
textByHashes.fb56200b86a04ee1630d0df9929092f4abc2617c: No I don't want it back thank you, you'll need to take that back to the examiner at the Digsite.
textByHashes.cf6e598cdf0b2bbbab6f41428183d907855d6fe6: Ah yes, a very impressive artefact. The people of that city were excellent sculptors.
textByHashes.f8e773499bbd49e8067948bf8da67096eb05226a: It's in the display case upstairs.
textByHashes.c2e471e34e0dcd61d678725019ea396df950df1d: What do you want it for?
textByHashes.0904c6623d95376f26ccadc881f4abf5bf91305d: Good heavens! I'd never let you do such a dangerous thing.
textByHashes.c1706f0aae2b1ab2141f87c678c4a5b33fdc3fb8: Well, you can't have it! This museum never lets go of its treasures.
textByHashes.6dd7af36dfad7b78b357e2c4ab9a53fafc4ac29d: That statuette was stolen recently, but now it's been returned.
textByHashes.872cd006527b070a2cafd20135a1bb9c9d19be80: I'm not entirely sure just yet.
textByHashes.9c62e25dd52fccefac89ef0744ead6818cdf6be9: We've seen some incredible specimens come back from Fossil Island!
textByHashes.43ce9ce27d3f16ae807981138f12f6b7c6c19a6c: Be sure to bring anything you find back for examination - we've got a brand new Palaeontology room downstairs dedicated to finds from the island.
textByHashes.89e1b593755c95cf7128ea262b4e2689c643da0a: Look around you! This museum is full of treasures!
textByHashes.395c67a17cd12027ecd6adf69afc80c3c65ed642: Any treasures this museum knows about it goes to great lengths to acquire.
textByHashes.5b877875130f482d8eb9cef786ddc11506286b40: Well, firstly you'll need to do a bit of work around the museum, then maybe we can talk.
textByHashes.8539007e2c947068ffbf3204b3e83979f4074306: Oh dear. You'll need 250 rubies, a Digsite pendant, 100 cosmic runes and 500 fire runes with you I'm afraid.
textByHashes.73dc65e64b5081f6d5da627a27fdc725fab798a3: Why, I can give you one now if you wish?
textByHashes.0fc7c7a364e5d2ce71a912e0ecd8726fd87e834a: Oh, well done! You managed to get both halves of the certificate!
textByHashes.1cbfeb0db3d08fe969bcf3a78487245daad459ac: Oh, wonderful! We are always eager to expand out collection!
textByHashes.9861963471532cc2525b5869dcc79822dd078fa5: Ruins? Beneath Ice Mountain? That's the first I've heard of this! What did you find down there?
textByHashes.9e244a3502fa2591a4c2fc64ce6d01980466291a: A city?! How? Which one? Was anyone living there?
textByHashes.7007a5d7903af8e17d56dbe35722667bc3ce295c: CAMDOZAAL!? You found the lost Imcando city of Camdozaal!?
textByHashes.8783062726e5bc0cfca18d8336f5cd7f175cf659: I'm lost for words! You accidentally found the lost city of Camdozaal! Please let me see these relics.
textByHashes.dc24802d3e984c8462199fc15aeb1fb2102d3ff5: Hmm, this is certainly not of Imcando design. Maybe it's from an older civilisation. How did you come across it?
textByHashes.735acd98d08c9f44b98eba517b006e6754868f6a: My word, a true mystery of an item? How did it get down there?
textByHashes.e670204279b45946a4ea4c206b716239287112f5: Thank you, kind sir! Pass them over to me and I'll identify them properly.
textByHashes.0bb3a195a6cb27c1db249cd67477cacbe15bfd07: Thank you, kind lady! Pass them over to me and I'll identify them properly.
textByHashes.430078cb1069fb71b90c1d0bb22d22640ed2f50e: This Ancient globe seems to show new constellations. What a discovery!
textByHashes.63bf1ea50c73013a38ddc037db1bc014b82d53b1: I wonder what secrets this Ancient ledger holds. It's a unique find!
textByHashes.02ad317f354d75690fe5bce1df02317b245a4052: An Ancient astroscope. I have only read of such things but to see one, incredible!
textByHashes.df77f0c26146d82ac8187d26d2559e29e55878d9: I'm not even familiar with the glyphs in this Ancient treatise. It's the first time I've seen them.
textByHashes.84a2c02ebfffb121d354d3550bc0c46df204cd67: What a find, this Ancient carcanet has never been documented before, but I'm certain it had a ceremonial purpose.
textByHashes.50f8203f39545d42e8fccca505d152b5e6420187: We already have examples of these other relics in the museum, but they will add nicely to our collection.
textByHashes.7693f2e84bea8331b8defb34ac3cb915001c5cd1: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.
textByHashes.2dff4ecde58d90c61d1efcf3cbcf25cd1d6549cc: Oh, there's an inscription on the back... 'There is an empire of darkness where hope flickers and dies.' Well, that's certainly ominous...
textByHashes.9cec71bf15425086f2d919be873e2c6824e274fd: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.
textByHashes.71efec42b3cddea78680bff77e08d242c09b17f6: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.
textByHashes.61d10c5668afa42791d282e5dd2bc185d3e4594f: The museum thanks you for your generosity.
textByHashes.a0facd1c5aa7a30f57d7fa0bb4a51f2588c85647: Oh, there's some words carved into the side here... 'There is an open wound that bleeds only darkness.' Rather dark for a children's toy, isn't it?
textByHashes.81f097170f58116723a024cb116e39af43c5f083: Oh, there's something etched into the blade... 'There is a stranger who wears a black mask under their skin.' That sounds... unpleasant.
textByHashes.f2eca4fa5707e281d71eef8b84c6e2e28e140cee: Oh, there's something written here... 'There is an ocean of souls where you are one day fated to swim.' Can you... swim in souls? Is that even possible?
textByHashes.15ffa7f1e1d25d875329018d5679ebfb29b1f318: Oh, someone's etched something into the face... 'There is a choir of souls who you will one day meet.' That sounds rather macabre, doesn't it?
textByHashes.98039fa6bec7b9714ebbf4e0f48fc0fc66800ee1: Oh, there's something carved in here... 'There is a king who presides over a court of corpses.' Hmm... I can't think of which king that could be referring to...
textByHashes.66491b27e4dea6ba90cb8e5c5d0742e72ba9436c: Oh, there's words on the arm here... 'There is a monument built in honour of the suffering you desire.' Well, I certainly don't desire suffering, thank you very much!
textByHashes.dc19fbf8068121b1f593d2558fc62bef01c928e3: Oh, there's an inscription on the back... 'There is a priest who prays for the oceans of dead.' Well, good for the dead, I suppose.
textByHashes.e6d94febc4f901708fdec571b473e02963e3c499: You know, that's quite a few items you've brought us that have some sort of strange text on them...
textByHashes.ee4a15142df3a8eded2326aa56edf927b4fa434a: When the darkness falls upon you, do you see the spires of the eternal city? When you look upon it, do you hear the songs from within?
textByHashes.657659fee5dba6e7d5a095074d8ffd01d16e96be: The choir sings in unison... but the song is one of silence. It cuts through the waves and pierces the veil, until only one question remains...
textByHashes.831a70248bfa5d1cd351792525a491a5ff42d94d: Oh, sorry about that. I lost my train of thought for a moment there.
textByHashes.701629432327f89bcc46cc750ff09e256394aea5: Hmm? I was just talking about how you keep finding things with these rather strange phrases on them. Slightly chilling, isn't it?
